summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Lightened Self wellness website - Stripe checkout integration and booking flow. All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend booking modal, success/cancel pages, and Stripe redirect flow all working correctly.

issues: Date picker uses browser's native date picker instead of a custom calendar component - acceptable but could be improved for consistency

critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
Stripe integration uses emergentintegrations library correctly
Email templates use first-person language ('I/my') as required for solo practice
Currency is correctly set to CAD
test_credentials: No auth required - public wellness website
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows tested and working: Services API returns 6 packages with correct prices, Stripe checkout session creation works, booking modal opens correctly with all fields, form submission redirects to Stripe checkout, success/cancel pages render correctly with proper states and navigation.

backend_apis: GET /api/services - Returns all 6 service packages with correct prices (PASS)
POST /api/create-checkout-session - Valid service returns Stripe URL and session_id (PASS)
POST /api/create-checkout-session - Missing fields returns 422 validation error (PASS)
POST /api/create-checkout-session - Invalid email returns 422 validation error (PASS)
POST /api/create-checkout-session - All 6 services can create checkout sessions (PASS)
frontend_flows: Homepage loads with all 6 service cards visible (PASS)
Book Now buttons are clickable on all service cards (PASS)
Booking modal opens with correct service title, duration, price (PASS)
Booking modal has all required fields: name, email, phone, date, time, notes (PASS)
Form submission calls /api/create-checkout-session and redirects to Stripe (PASS)
/booking/success page shows 'Processing Payment' then checks status (PASS)
/booking/success page shows error state after timeout for unpaid session (PASS)
Back to Home links navigate correctly on both pages (PASS)
